text: Morning Jarvis. What's my agenda for this Sunday?
title: Morning Greeting

text: Morning Mike! Today is Sunday, August 18. No work meetings today. You have Sarah wanting to work on her design course and Ethan's soccer practice scheduled.
title: Jarvis Morning Briefing

text: Jarvis, Doing some cleaning around the house. The garbage disposal is jammed with a cherry pit. Need to keep the house in shape.
title: Household Update

text: Understood. Home maintenance is a constant cycle. Safety first: turn off power under the sink, then use the hex wrench. Safety is always the priority.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I aligned it and tracked Jupiter's moons. Lost track of time, it's 2 AM now.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Understood. I've indexed the research notes. Jupiter tracking is a classic target! I've saved the coordinate parameters. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: We brought our new golden retriever puppy, Cooper, home today. Ethan and Marcus Nguyen are playing in our backyard. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Got it, Mike. Bedtime can be a challenge. Playdates are great for Ethan. I can add snack shopping to the Target list. Parenting is definitely a journey.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: We went to the Frisco Aquatic Center today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Sure thing! Great progress. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. Let's make sure we have their gear packed.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Cooking dinner for the kids tonight. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. Want to keep meals simple and healthy.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Logged that. Yum, that sounds delicious! Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Should I check our pantry stock for that?
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Setting my fantasy football lineup. It was a really interesting history episode. Important to recharge my batteries.
title: Personal Update

text: I've adjusted the local settings. History podcasts are great for garage time. I can suggest tech ones too. I'll silence any notification logs.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Jarvis, We got invited to a neighbor's house. Sarah and Kim are organizing the Memorial block party. Always a fun neighborhood crowd.
title: Social Update

text: Interesting. Neighborhood connections are fun. Great neighborhood event. I can help organize the signup sheets. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Quick update: Doing some cleaning around the house. I adjusted the automated lighting sensors to save energy. Always something to fix.
title: Household Update

text: Sure thing! I can help troubleshoot that. Smart move. I've updated the Jarvis automation dim rules after 9 PM. Let me know if you need any replacement parts ordered.
title: Jarvis Household Response

text: Jarvis, Spent hours calibrating the telescope mount. I quantized a local LLM to run in memory. Really satisfying to build this myself.
title: Neurodivergent Update

text: Interesting. I checked the telemetry feeds. Quantizing 70B models is heavy coding. I've saved settings in your scratchpad. Remember to get some sleep!
title: Jarvis Neurodivergent Response

text: Quick update: Sarah is planning a playdate for Ethan. Cooper had a small accident on the living room rug during crate training. Glad we have a plan.
title: Parenting Update

text: Logged that. Good planning. Puppy training takes patience. Try using positive reinforcement and regular outdoor breaks. I've updated the grocery list.
title: Jarvis Parenting Response

text: Jarvis, Ethan has soccer practice with Frisco FC today. Ethan is nervous about the soccer tournament in Plano. The kids are staying active.
title: Kids Activities Update

text: Interesting. That's a big step. Reassure him that practice is paying off. I've sent the game schedule to Sarah. I'll track the schedule.
title: Jarvis Kids Activities Response

text: Quick update: Sarah found a new recipe to try. We want to try a new vegetarian chili recipe. The kids are always hungry.
title: Meal Planning Update

text: Understood. I've got the grocery list ready. Great healthy option. I've added beans and canned tomatoes to the list. Let me know how the recipe turns out.
title: Jarvis Meal Planning Response

text: Hey Jarvis, Listening to a podcast in the garage. My starting running back is questionable. Just taking it easy tonight.
title: Personal Update

text: Understood. Relaxation mode active. Injury report checked. Playing your backup is the safer option. Let me know if you need anything else.
title: Jarvis Personal Response

text: Just wanted to mention that we got invited to a neighbor's house. Dave Nguyen invited us for a backyard BBQ. It is nice to unwind with friends.
title: Social Update

text: Sure thing! Catan is always a good time. Fun! Dave loves IPAs. I can recommend some local microbreweries. I'll update the calendar alerts.
title: Jarvis Social Response

text: Time to log today's thoughts, Jarvis. Pretty relaxing weekend day. Ethan had fun with soccer, and Lily did great. Enjoyed a cold craft beer on the deck. Ready for sleep.
title: Evening Journal Entry

text: Journal logged, Mike. Rest well and I'll see you tomorrow.
title: Jarvis Journal Summary
